title: lotus eriophthalmus
intro: Lotus eriophthalmus, also known as the Lotus or Euryale plant, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lotus eriophthalmus include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
